summary: The diff shows targeted spacing improvements in `frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts`, introducing named spacing constants (SECTION_GAP, HEADER_H, HEADER_BOTTOM_PAD, FIELD_LABEL_H, FIELD_LINE_H, FIELD_BOTTOM_PAD, SUB_HEADER_BOTTOM), increased margin to 48pt, improved section/field layout helpers, and a bordered signature box. These changes directly address REQ-1. No constraints were violated (client-side jsPDF CDN preserved, no fields added/removed, no font/color changes, no backend changes). All acceptance criteria appear addressed based on the diff evidence.
